blended.narrative: Grouse Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 15 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,205 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: light rain showers, highs of 42°F.
Sunday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
